title: Dead-lettered messages
description: Messages that failed processing after all retries. Inspect the payload, then replay to re-process or discard to drop permanently.

replayDialog.title: Replay this message?
replayDialog.description: The message will be re-published to its original subject and processed again. If it still fails, it returns to the dead-letter queue.

discardDialog.title: Discard this message?
discardDialog.description: The message will be permanently dropped from the dead-letter queue and will not be processed. This cannot be undone.

toasts.replayError: Could not replay the message. Please try again.
toasts.discardError: Could not discard the message. Please try again.

inspect.title: Message details
inspect.description: Full payload and error for this dead-lettered message.
inspect.subject: Original subject

empty.title: No dead-lettered messages
empty.description: Failed messages will appear here when processing exhausts all retries. An empty queue is a healthy queue.

emptyFiltered.title: No matching messages
emptyFiltered.description: No dead-lettered messages match your current filters. Try adjusting or clearing them.

error.title: Failed to load the dead-letter queue
error.description: Something went wrong while fetching dead-lettered messages.
